endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all registrations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}
endpoints.description: Returns the properties of an Azure Stack registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}
endpoints.description: Create or update an Azure Stack registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}
endpoints.description: Delete the requested Azure Stack registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}/getactivationkey
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.
